testcase.name: testUpdateCharacter_UserNotFound
testcase.failure: class com.tus.characters.exceptions.ResourceNotFoundException class java.lang.IllegalArgumentException org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Unexpected exception type thrown, expected: <com.tus.characters.exceptions.ResourceNotFoundException> but was: <java.lang.IllegalArgumentException> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertThrows.assertThrows(AssertThrows.java:67) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertThrows.assertThrows(AssertThrows.java:35) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertThrows(Assertions.java:3128) at com.tus.characters.service.impl.CharacterServiceImplTest.testUpdateCharacter_UserNotFound(CharacterServiceImplTest.java:320) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) Caused by: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Level must be between 1 and 20 at com.tus.characters.service.impl.CharacterServiceImpl.updateCharacter(CharacterServiceImpl.java:90) at com.tus.characters.service.impl.CharacterServiceImplTest.lambda$5(CharacterServiceImplTest.java:321) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertThrows.assertThrows(AssertThrows.java:53) ... 6 more

testcase.name: testUpdateCharacter_InvalidLevel_ThrowsException
testcase.failure: Character level must be between 1 and 100 Level must be between 1 and 20 org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Character level must be between 1 and 100> but was: <Level must be between 1 and 20> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at com.tus.characters.service.impl.CharacterServiceImplTest.testUpdateCharacter_InvalidLevel_ThrowsException(CharacterServiceImplTest.java:361) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
